title: Smemorandum – Reminders
subtitle: Birthdays, Holidays & Deadlines
shortDescription: Smart reminders for birthdays, holidays & deadlines. WhatsApp wishes included! 🎂
fullDescription:
Smemorandum is the smart reminder app that never forgets. Perfect for keeping track of birthdays, anniversaries, recurring events and important deadlines — stress free.

📅 WHAT YOU CAN DO:

• Birthday and anniversary reminders with customizable notifications
• Manage deadlines for bills, appointments and subscription renewals
• 🌍 Pre-loaded holidays for your country: add Christmas, Easter, Thanksgiving and 50+ national holidays in one tap
• 💬 Send WhatsApp birthday wishes with 5 ready-made message templates, directly from the reminder
• Visual calendar with daily and monthly view
• Multiple reminders per event (same day, day before, week before)
• 📊 Event statistics: monthly distribution and by category
• 📅 Weekly digest every Monday morning with upcoming events
• Custom notification sounds for each event
• 🎨 5 color themes to personalize the interface (purple, blue, green, orange, rose)
• Automatic recurrences: yearly, monthly, weekly, custom intervals
• Customizable categories with icons and colors
• Auto-import birthdays from your phone contacts
• Fast search across all your reminders
• Backup and restore your data
• Light, dark and automatic theme
• Available in English, Italian, Spanish, French, German

🔒 100% PRIVATE:
All your data stays only on your device. No external servers, no data collection. GDPR compliant.

✨ PREMIUM FEATURES:
• Zero ads, forever
• Unlimited categories (free: max 3)
• Multiple reminders per event
• All notification sounds
• All country holiday packs + religious traditions (Catholic, Protestant, Jewish, Islamic)
• Unlimited backups

🎯 WHY SMEMORANDUM:

Forgetful? Don't worry — Smemorandum has you covered! Set your reminders once and never think about them again. Whether it's a birthday, a bill, or an anniversary, Smemorandum will remind you right on time.

Never miss an important birthday again. Download Smemorandum for free today!
